---
title: "fongping hydro main"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## QUARTO

```{r}
#| echo: false
```

# INPUT

## PACKAGE
```{r}
packages <- name listing 

install if you dont 

libraray(packages)
```

## READ DATA
```{r}
read here (data/**flowdata name notsure**.csv) # 10 days running average flow, might have other data

# might need to pull in other data
```

## MODULES
```{r}
read module (here(module))
```

# baseline

## reservoir  module 
### run reservoir for a year (time step)
### sediment ? 

## MONEY MODULE
### daily energy generation * 365
### yearly profit 
### 100 NPV

# CC scenario (deviation of the inflow increase / maybe percipitation data)
## lishan station data
### CC saga <-- manipulation of inflow data
